title: Smoky Saudia Kebab Crumble
description: A kid-friendly smoky and crispy Saudi Arabian dish featuring a red wine jelly base that's air-fried for an extra crunch and made dairy-free-friendly.

ingredients.name: Air-Fryer Basket or Non-Stick Sheet Pan

instructions: Preheat your kitchen to at least 130°C (265°F) for safe frying temperatures.
In a small bowl, mix together the Red Wine Jelly Mix, almond flour, and optional cocoa powder until well combined. Adjust the consistency if needed by adding a few drops of vegetable oil.
Carefully pour the mixture into your air-fryer basket or sheet pan lined with parchment paper to prevent sticking. Press down gently to spread evenly.
Place in an air fryer preheated at 130°C (265°F) for about 7-8 minutes, flipping halfway through until golden brown and crisp on the outside but still soft inside.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly before serving. Can be enjoyed as a dessert or snack with your choice of toppings like fresh fruit or whipped coconut cream.
